creator: mbaptist.opensource@gmail.com
text:
> By the way, I was able to boot FreeBSD 13.1 Gen2 VM on Intel Xeon 8260 (Cascade Lake) host in my lab.

Is this a hyper V or Azure Stack HCI host or Azure Cloud host?

I also have been able to boot up successfully under other hypervisors booting GPT UEFI, just out MSFT Azure Cloud hyperscaler.
